data.title: Dow Jones up on Trump-China deal hope, surprising economic data; Cathie Wood buys Tesla stock.
data.description: Following unexpected economic data, the Dow Jones index saw a notable increase. Tesla stock surged due to the announcement of their upcoming robotaxi service launch. The latest stock market updates show a positive trajectory, with hopes of a favorable deal between Trump and China contributing to the Dow's rise. Additionally, investor Cathie Wood has heavily invested in Tesla stock.

data.title: White House released an Executive Order "Ending Crime and Disorder on America's Streets" targeting homelessness and mental illness, making it easier to involuntarily treat people with serious mental illnesses.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Arlington, Virginia, a recent Executive Order titled "Ending Crime and Disorder on America's Streets" was unveiled by the White House. The Order aims to streamline the process of involuntarily treating individuals with severe mental illnesses. This initiative is part of a larger effort to address issues related to mental health and public safety. The Order calls for federal agencies to work towards facilitating the treatment of individuals with serious mental illnesses.

data.title: Boston Teamsters and coalition demand AV regulation for Waymo at City Hall, calling for accountability; joined by elected officials.
data.description: A group consisting of Teamsters, a coalition of unions, and various elected officials gathered at City Hall in Boston on July 25, 2025. Their aim was to push for accountability measures for Autonomous Vehicle (AV) companies like Waymo before allowing them to operate freely within the city. The coalition stressed the importance of regulating these companies to ensure public safety and proper oversight. Key figures in attendance included representatives from different unions and a number of city officials. The call for action comes amid growing concerns surrounding the deployment of AVs in urban areas.

data.title: Spacelift to host IaCConf Spotlight virtual event on IaC Security & Governance. Call for Presenters closes August 1.
data.description: The deadline for presenter applications is approaching on August 1st in REDWOOD CITY, California, as per news released on July 25, 2025. Spacelift is calling for presenters for IaCConf Spotlight: IaC Security & Governance, a virtual event that follows the success of the first IaCConf. This free event will center on tackling the shifting obstacles in securing and overseeing infrastructure as code.
